name: nncckkrr.space
notes: v39.3.18 anomaly enemy stress pack: adds ten unusual registry-driven enemies (MRR/ORB/ANC/SPL/PRS/PLS/LCH/NUL/BNC/HRD), unified anomaly effect renderers, data-driven front projectile deflection, death-spawn stress behavior, loop-gated anomaly pools, and runtime guards/scenarios to stress enemy architecture without hardcoding a new arena-shooter if-chain.
